name: claude-chat
description: Chat application powered by Claude via the Anthropic API

scripts.copy:assets: cp src/client/index.html dist/public/ && cp src/client/style.css dist/public/
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/public && npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run copy:assets
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/public && npm run copy:assets && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
